description: North Star knowledge seed packs — pre-validated knowledge items for common domains. Two collections: developer_core (9 packs) and cross_domain (10 packs).

packs.name: architecture
packs.description: Software architecture principles, patterns, and trade-offs

packs.name: design_patterns
packs.description: GoF patterns, enterprise integration patterns, and architectural patterns

packs.name: testing
packs.description: Testing strategies, methodologies, and tooling concepts

packs.name: documentation
packs.description: Code and system documentation best practices

packs.name: security
packs.description: Application security, OWASP, authentication, and secure coding

packs.name: deployment
packs.description: CI/CD, containerisation, orchestration, and release strategies

packs.name: observability
packs.description: Logging, metrics, tracing, alerting, and SLOs

packs.name: data_modeling
packs.description: Database design, schema patterns, indexing, and migrations

packs.name: performance
packs.description: Caching, query optimisation, async patterns, and scalability
